# Recommended GitHub Repository Description (under 350 chars)
# Set this in: Repository Settings > About > Description
#
# Current recommendation:
Open source design audit tool for Claude Code. Scores UI/UX across 12 dimensions (color contrast, typography, accessibility, layout, and more) using WCAG 2.1, APCA, and OKLCH color science. Zero dependencies. One command. Actionable fixes with before/after code.
